resolveCooldown — tiered cooldown after failed attempts
attempt 0 → 0s (no prior failures)
attempt 1 → 0s (first failure, no cooldown)
attempt 2 → 0s (second failure, no cooldown)
attempt 3 → 5s (third failure, tier-2 cooldown starts)
attempt 4 → 5s (fourth failure, still tier-2)
attempt 5 → 15s (fifth failure, tier-3 cooldown starts)
attempt 10 → 15s (well past tier-3, stays at 15s)
attempt 100 → 15s (extreme case never exceeds 15s)

does not contain "invalid login credentials" (raw Supabase message)
does not contain "Email not confirmed" (Supabase exact casing)

produces [0, 0, 5, 5, 15, 15] across 6 consecutive failures
resets to 0 after successful login clears the attempt counter
applies max tier correctly starting at attempt 5, not 6
cooldown after success reset is 0 even if prior count was 10
